name: Smith Machine Deadlift
shortDescription: A guided barbell deadlift performed with a Smith machine to build lower back, glutes, and hamstrings strength.
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart beneath the Smith bar. Hold the bar with an overhand grip, hinge at your hips, bend knees, and keep your back neutral. Extend hips and knees to lift the bar along the rails, then return slowly under control.
steps: Position feet shoulder-width beneath the Smith bar.
Grip the bar just outside your knees with both hands.
Hinge hips back and lower torso, keeping chest up.
Extend hips and knees to lift the bar along the guides.
Lower the bar with control to the starting position.
commonMistakes: Lifting with arms instead of legs
Letting the bar drift away from body
breathing: Inhale as you lower the bar, exhale as you lift.
